vo.milo.story.pipMeetsPets.p1.transcript: Pip the Parrot visits a sunny pet room.

vo.milo.story.pipMeetsPets.p2.transcript: Hello, cat! A small cat purrs on a soft mat.

vo.milo.story.pipMeetsPets.p3.transcript: Hi, dog! A happy dog wags its tail. Hello, rabbit! Hop, hop, hop.

vo.milo.story.pipMeetsPets.p4.transcript: A bird, a fish, and a hamster wave too. So many new friends!

vo.milo.story.pipMeetsPets.q1.transcript: Which pet did Pip meet first?

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p1.transcript: Coco the Goat walks on the farm. She wants to hear a quiet sound.

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p2.transcript: The cow says moo. The sheep says baa. Not so quiet.

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p3.transcript: The pig says oink. The horse says neigh. Still not so quiet.

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p4.transcript: The duck says quack. The chicken says cluck. Loud and proud!

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p5.transcript: Coco peeks in the pond. A fish blows bubbles. Bubble, bubble. So quiet!

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.p6.transcript: Every voice is welcome on the farm. Loud, soft, big, small — all friends.

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.q1.transcript: Which animal made the quietest sound?

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.q2.transcript: What sound does the horse make?

vo.luna.story.theQuietestAnimal.q3.transcript: Put Coco's farm walk in order.

vo.milo.u3.l4.tapBirdCantSwimFar.transcript: Tap: a bird can't swim like a fish.

vo.luna.u3.l4.tapBirdCantSwimFar.transcript: Tap: a bird can't swim like a fish.

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p1.transcript: In the forest, the friends share what they can do.

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p2.transcript: I can fly, says the bird. Up, up, up!

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p3.transcript: I can swim, says the fish. Swish, swish, swish!

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p4.transcript: I can climb, says the bear. Up the big tree!

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p5.transcript: A fish can't walk. A cat can't fly. That's okay — we all do different things.

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.p6.transcript: Everyone can do something. What can you do today?

vo.milo.story.whatCanYouDo.q3.transcript: Put the friends in the order they spoke.

mus.onCocosFarm.transcript: On Coco's farm the day begins, A cow steps out and moo, moo, moo. A sheep walks by and baa, baa, baa, A pig says oink — hello to you! On Coco's farm the friends all sing, Different voices, every one! A horse goes neigh, a duck goes quack, A chicken clucks beneath the sun. Cow and sheep and pig and horse, Duck and chicken — all together! On Coco's farm we sing along, Every voice and every feather. On Coco's farm we sing along, One big farm, one happy song!

mus.bigSmallTallShort.transcript: Big! and small, Tall and short. Big like a horse, small like a mouse, Tall like a tree, short like a house. Big and small, tall and short, Every size is just the right sort! Big! Small! Tall! Short! Sing it loud — we love them all!
